summary: Current HY OAS at 2.81% (Jan 5, 2026), near historical lows. Recent trend mildly tightening from 3.0 in late Nov to 2.81. Daily std ~0.03, 18 trading days to resolution.
content:
Key data points:
- Current value: 2.81% (Jan 5, 2026)
- Recent range (Nov-Jan): 2.81-3.00
- Daily std of changes: 0.0302
- Daily mean change: -0.007 (tightening)
- Trading days to Jan 30: ~18
- Expected std over period: ~0.13-0.16 depending on model
- Historical lows: ~2.33 (2007), ~2.61 (late 2024)
- Current level near post-COVID lows
- Asymmetric risk: more room for widening than tightening
